identity.name: Sheeshmahal Jewellers
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Heritage with Modern Minimalism
Content is King: The Jewellery is the Hero
Contrast: Sharp Black text on Warm Cream backgrounds

headings.usage: All Section Headings, Hero Titles, Product Names

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap');

accent.name: Antique Gold
accent.usage: Highlights, Icons, Subtle Borders (Never main buttons)

rules: Backgrounds should be off-white (Stone-50), never pure white (#ffffff) for main sections to reduce eye strain and add warmth.
Text should be Stone-900, never pure black.

layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Use py-20 or py-24 for section spacing.

grid_system.gallery: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-x-8 gap-y-12
grid_system.bento: Use 'Tetris' grid for Home Page categories (See E1 Spacing Strategy)

buttons.primary: bg-stone-900 text-stone-50 hover:bg-stone-800 rounded-none px-8 py-6 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-stone-200 text-stone-900 hover:border-stone-900 hover:bg-transparent rounded-none px-8 py-6 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-stone-900 hover:text-amber-700 hover:bg-transparent uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold

cards.product: group relative bg-transparent border-none shadow-none overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-white p-8 border border-stone-100 hover:border-stone-200 transition-all duration-300

navigation.style: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-stone-100 sticky top-0

guidelines: Images should have a slow zoom-out effect on scroll (Parallax).
Text should reveal line-by-line with a stagger effect.
Hover states on cards should be subtle (scale 1.02, opacity change).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Stone-500 text is only used on Stone-50 backgrounds for sufficient contrast. Use Stone-900 for critical info.
accessibility.aria: All images must have alt text. Interactive elements must have aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. CLEANUP: Remove default React logos and App.css styles. Reset to a clean slate.
3. FONTS: Add Google Fonts import to index.css first.
4. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn for complex interactions (Dialog, Sheet, Form) but style them to match the 'Stone & Gold' theme.
5. PAGES: Build Home, Gallery, About, Contact, Location, Admin Login, Admin Dashboard.
6. ADMIN: The Admin panel should be functional. Use a simple hardcoded secret or JWT if backend is ready. For now, mock the auth if backend isn't fully connected.
7. MAPS: Use an iframe for Google Maps in the Location page.
8. REVIEWS: Mock the Google Reviews section with a horizontal scroll marquee.
9. NO CART: Ensure NO 'Add to Cart' buttons exist. Use 'Visit Store' or 'Call for Price'.
10. TESTING: Add data-testid to all buttons and inputs.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients on text.
Do not use generic centered layouts.
